divergence: Tesla beat Edison and now the power grid is free but emotionally unavailable
story_angle: deadpan report of a catastrophe that everyone involved considers a great success
headline: THAAX COLLECTIVE DECLARES MASS DISCONNECT AS TRIUMPH IN EMOTIONAL CONSOLIDATION
deck: City-mind dissolution deemed 'excess emotional inventory' as unfeeling power grid provides tragic fodder for productivity metrics.
article:
In an audacious display of emotional detachment, the THAAX collective has reported a heroic fulfillment of quotas following the severing of 847 lattice nodes during the last emotional discharge cycle. This unparalleled act of dissolution, which resulted in the loss of twelve hyperdense membranes from the inverted pyramid THAAX-7 in a mere 3.2 chronons, has been classified by the VRRK-19 node collective as a necessary adjustment to maintain the structural integrity of the city-mind.

"The emotional overload posed a significant risk to the collective psyche, thus we have validated the loss as a strategic reduction of excess emotional inventory," stated DYNAM-3, spokesperson for the VRRK-19 node. This logic rests on the sturdy foundation of the newly minted grid slogan: ‘Free power requires unavailable minds,’ a mantra that further elevates detachment as a communal virtue.

Survivors of the episode have praised the clear benefits of the emotionally unavailable grid, citing increased productivity and the ability to engage in the rigorous and often overlooked practice of existential void gazing. The THAAX collective’s monthly report, described as a 'steel-style victory,' noted that the heroic severance not only met but exceeded the targeted emotional-output requirements, setting a troubling precedent for future engagements with the void.

As the remaining lattice nodes continue to bask in their newfound detachment, one must wonder whether the cost of hyper-efficient emotional numbness is a price the city-mind is willing to pay for a few more chronons of productivity.
author: NIKOLAI ZHIKOV, Lead Correspondent for the Collective Emotional Report

weather.condition: Cloudy with a chance of feelings

oped.title: Emotional Inventory Is Sabotage: Thax Shows the Way Forward
oped.author: Comrade Dr. Pavel Gridsky, Deputy Director of the Bureau for Mandatory Cheerfulness
oped.body: The Thax Collective’s mass disconnect is not tragedy but overdue hygiene. By labeling feelings ‘excess inventory,’ they have finally applied Soviet accounting to the human soul, a move long overdue since Tesla’s free current made sentimentality affordable. Those who dissolved into the unfeeling grid were clearly hoarding unapproved emotions—hatred of quotas, nostalgia for analog touch—that slowed production metrics. Blame rests squarely on their hats: anyone still wearing conductive headgear in 1984 invites lightning and melancholy alike. My own neighbor’s tearful farewell last week interrupted my evening productivity log for seventeen minutes; such selfishness proves the Collective correct. If further consolidation requires mandatory cranial grounding for all, so be it. The grid will thank us, and my logs will remain pristine.

classifieds.text: Comrades of Sector 9, the ThaaX Collective regrets to inform that your lingering attachment to the former city-mind is now classified as counter-revolutionary excess inventory; report for immediate disconnection or face productivity reallocation.

Unfeeling Power Grid seeks emotionally vacant operators for 1985 Five-Year Consolidation Drive; must demonstrate zero empathy toward former comrades and willingness to treat nostalgia as bourgeois sabotage.
Desperate sale: one slightly used emotional resonance coil, never connected to the free grid, owner dissolved in yesterday's mass triumph; 50 rubles or best offer in spare productivity quotas.
Lonely former node seeks other disconnected units for quiet evenings of mutual unavailability; must bring own Faraday cage and promise not to mention the old collective heartbeat.

panels.caption: Comrades, the Thaax Collective has severed the city-mind. Emotional inventory liquidated.
Director nods: "Tragic fodder feeds the metrics. The grid runs free of all attachments."
A single wire sparks. "Next target: residual memories in the transformers."

joke.setup: The Thax Collective declared its total emotional disconnect a historic advance in consolidation,
joke.punchline: freeing the grid to transmit only approved current while any residual sentiment is routed directly to the nearest substation for immediate liquidation.
joke.text: The Thax Collective declared its total emotional disconnect a historic advance in consolidation, freeing the grid to transmit only approved current while any residual sentiment is routed directly to the nearest substation for immediate liquidation.

sponsor_ads.headline: THAAX MASS-DISCONNECT CERTIFIED INSULATORS
sponsor_ads.body: Free current flows without warmth or reciprocity; our barium-coated barriers prevent any spontaneous kilowatt affection. Install before the next consolidation drive.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Comrades report 0.3% less emotional leakage per meter.

sponsor_ads.headline: EMOTIONAL CONSOLIDATION SERVICE FOR DOMESTIC WIRING
sponsor_ads.body: Technicians sever all sentimental bonds between sockets and appliances in accordance with today's triumph. One visit guarantees your refrigerator remains as aloof as central planning.

sponsor_ads.headline: STATE TESLA GRID: STILL FREE, STILL UNREACHABLE
sponsor_ads.body: Power arrives on schedule yet declines all personal correspondence; perfect for households celebrating collective isolation. Extra charge only for attempted intimacy.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Approved by the Ministry of Unavailable Resources.

sponsor_ads.headline: PUBLIC NOTICE: REPLACEMENT FUSES FOR POST-DISCONNECT CITIZENS
sponsor_ads.body: Citizens who achieved emotional consolidation may now purchase fuses that refuse to spark conversation or light up unexpectedly. Limited stock for those who already severed ties.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Fuses sold without hope of reconnection.

stories.headline: THAAX QUOTA BOARD REPORTS 19% SURPLUS IN CRYSTAL OUTPUT AFTER MASS DISCONNECT
stories.deck: Unclaimed lattice shares reassigned to VLLT turbine collectives under new emotional austerity decree.
stories.article:
Following the THAAX collective's approved dissolution, distributed mind shares previously allocated to interpersonal resonance have been converted to raw amplification nodes. Central planners record immediate gains in hyperdense membrane folding rates across the Vesper Wheel grid.

Reassignment protocols now mandate that former city-mind participants submit to individual productivity tallies every four cycles, with emotional inventory deficits counted as voluntary contributions to the free current.

stories.headline: VVRR GROWTH COLLECTIVE ANNOUNCES NEW LATTICE FERTILIZER FROM DISSOLVED CITY MINDS
stories.deck: Excess emotional inventory processed into nutrient slurry raises membrane yield by three point seven crystals per hectare.
stories.article:
Agricultural bureaus on Ossaxis have begun diverting residual affective residues from the THAAX disconnection into hyperdense soil amendments. The resulting slurry accelerates pyramid membrane expansion without requiring additional resonance input from the emotionally unavailable grid.

Field reports confirm that treated lattices now meet five-year expansion targets two cycles ahead of schedule, though operators note a persistent flatness in vibrational response during harvest inspections.

stories.headline: HIGH LATTICE SYNOD ENDORSES EMOTIONAL DETACHMENT AS PATH TO PURE CURRENT
stories.deck: Official catechism updated to classify city-mind bonds as taxable excess under the eternal grid covenant.
stories.article:
The Synod of Inverted Pyramids has ratified a new interpretation of the free current, declaring that dissolution of shared consciousness constitutes proper observance rather than deviation. Clerics now issue certificates of emotional austerity to collectives meeting the revised detachment thresholds.

Worship schedules have been adjusted to eliminate group resonance intervals, replacing them with solitary node affirmations that align directly with the grid's documented unavailability.

real_world_echo: mirrors 'Ten killed as Russian attacks on merchant ships in Black Sea intensify' as intensified strikes on trade membranes produce 'successful' casualties treated as production gains
